content: GitHub Actions macos-15 runner has Xcode 16.4+ (Xcode 26 RC being added). macos-latest migrated to macos-15 Aug 2025. SPM cache at ~/Library/Caches/org.swift.swiftpm and ~/Library/org.swift.swiftpm. DerivedData cache at ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData. actions/cache@v4 with Package.resolved key. macos-26 image in public preview. macos-14 deprecated Nov 2025.
